title: Revenue and Customs Brief 7 (2025): Revised VAT grouping rules and the Skandia judgment
body: "This brief explains HMRC’s revised position on the UK VAT treatment of intra-entity services involving establishments located in an EU member state that are part of a UK VAT group.    The brief also provides details for businesses that may have previously accounted for VAT under the ‘reverse charge mechanism’, in line with the previous position. "
